sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66066" key="melisso/tokos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελισσό-τοκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n66066.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">produced by bees</tr_>: metaph., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">honied</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὕμνοι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.12</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
